0.title: Some things might be missing here

description.0: Due to this being a pretty large update some details might be missing in this changelog
Now the Spotify now listening vinyl work
description.1: Now the currently playing information in the menu work
description.2: Now the letterboxd diary box works

2.title: Fixed redirecting not working on certain browsers

description.0: Now on all mobile devices and in app webviews argil.dev should redirect to argil.dev/mobile, this is now done via javascript instead of cloudflare redirects
Now has better scaling and sizing for mobile; with smaller text, less padding, smaller images and less whitespace

4.title: Updated currently playing info in the menu

description.0: It's now properly styled, with bolder colors, borders and more

5.title: Some themes now have dark/light mode variants

description.0: Automatically swaps between the two depending on device settings
description.1: Valentine, Pride, Holidays, Sepia currently have dark and now light mode variants
description.2: Halloween, Invert and Teenage Engineering don't
